result.stdout:
ApiKit.Generators.ChangelogGenerator 1.0.0+164ab2850cc21aa61a9dbf153d4ef326f7d8cad7
Copyright (C) 2026 Asseco South Eastern Europe

  -o, --output-file               (Default: changelog) Specifies output file
                                  name.

  -p, --provider-level            (Default: false) If specified, changelog will
                                  include changes relevant for providers.

  -j, --json                      (Default: false) If specified, changelog
                                  output will be in json format.

  -b, --breaking-changes-check    (Default: false) If specified, check if there
                                  are any breaking changes

  --help                          Display this help screen.

  --version                       Display version information.

  SPECIFICATION 1 (pos. 1)        Required. First input file for comparison.
                                  JSON and YAML formats supported.

  SPECIFICATION 2 (pos. 2)        Required. Second input file for comparison.
                                  JSON and YAML formats supported.
